programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Midnight Ride
programme.desc: A house wife just left her cop husband, when she picks up Justin Mckay she'll wish she never did as she's plunged into a nightmare and the grip of a psychotic killer.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Fury Spinner Ep 11 Part A
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S2 Ep 21
programme.desc: Boonie Cubs Season 2 is a bran-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. It follows young Vick, who finds a magical portal in a tree and finds a wonderful world where he attends Pine Tree Kindergarten with young Briar, young Bramble, and other kids where he learns in fun and exciting ways. Here they will learn how to get along with others, explore the wonders of nature and science while cultivating a zest for life.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: I' ll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn' t chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it' s all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren' t really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac Ep 51
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! Come journey with us to a charming little town called Fortune Valley, where the twelve animal-totems now associated with the Chinese lunar calendar spend their days frolicking merrily, often joining together to pursue a host of colorful projects and plans.

programme.desc: Lord Kann gives Snakehammer an ultimatum. The scatterbrained inventor must finally come up with something tangible...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: While fishing, a ghost ship suddenly emerges from the fog and rams the friends' boat the children now have to help the captain. / Prof. Knox has accidentally shrunk himself in a self-experiment and tries to get F&F's attention. / &F have a new computer game, but Lupo does everything wrong and eventually all three of them are drawn into the game / Dad drinks too much coffee and has to cut back for health reasons. Mom knows her husband and has prepared everything so that he can't get coffee anywhere in the city. It all ends up in the coffee factory...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly takes her clothes into the kitchen to wash them, her father notices that Milly is missing some stockings. He asks her to look for them in her room. To make the search easier, Milly uses her father's clothes color selector. She soon realizes that the clothes colour selector is also great for finding stockings. The professor is also amazed and realizes once again what a wonderful daughter he has.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: When Crocadoo runs out of food, crocodile Jazz looks for a job. Hotel manager Hartacker actually hires him as an assistant cook. In the meantime, surveyors turn up at the crocodiles...

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: The lads try their luck at getting a spear into one of the quintessential Australian fish species - the barramundi. Problem is, these 'barra' inhabit the same waters as a couple of other less welcome locals - saltwater crocodiles and bull sharks!

programme.title: Our Auto Expert
programme.desc: Nik explores BMW's electrified future. Mike off-roads in the Nissan Titan Pro-4X. Cadillac shines with the new Escalade. Nik highlights Toyota Tundra's value. He enjoys the Jeep Wrangler Rubicon 392.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Whether it's building an engine, restoring parts, or hiding mannequins, Mark's Cousin Dougie is on it. He's one of the most pivotal Ghouls, working on a vast number of Mopar restoration projects or tasks that are essential to the success of the shop.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The Pheonix 'Cuda, the car that survived a deadly explosion, is ready for its purification. Its rust and metal are seared away to expose its hidden sins. Thus begins the first stage of its monumental rebirth.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: In our second to last episode of the season, the ghouls shift into high gear to make progress on our In-Violet 1971 'Cuda Convertible. And work begins on our SEMA 2019 build!

programme.title: Find Me A Classic

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: GT, those two letters stand for vehicles that combine sportiness with long-distance comfort. One of the most beautiful models of this category is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable and most suitable McLaren for long distances, while still retaining its sports car genes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Mercedes launches a new cabriolet offensive. For the first time ever, the C class is available as open-top models. The C43 AMG acts as the entry-level model to the Mercedes-AMG cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well. The S model Porsche's characteristic sporty setup make for the perfect open-air feeling.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. It features the finest materials and an impressive V12 engine. Range Rover, however, took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet. The iconic manufacturer combined two things that usually don't really fit together: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. Still, it's one of the most performance-oriented convertibles in the world. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level. This exclusive convertible opened a new chapter in the success story of Rolls Royce.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's DB series bears the initials of David Brown, the man who after the Second World War brought new glory to the British brand. With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Audi R8 V10 plus
programme.desc: A segunda geração do Audi R8 na versão V10 plus

programme.title: Cadillac Escalade
programme.desc: Cadillac's luxurious SUV Escalade.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. All over the world these fighting bulls from Italy are famous for their spectacular design and massive power. Wherever they're spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador, two of the currently produced models, always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big, fast and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. The interior of these cars feels like a luxurious living room. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the iconic brand's first SUV model. And, another luxury crossover SUV premiere: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a super sports car built in Austria, was limited to 33 units, extremely light and had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. But the best thing about this racer made of titanium, carbon and aluminum was that it was street-legal. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited to 300 units whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Food Mad
programme.desc: Whether it is midnight hunger pangs or on-the-go food that you desire, Rocky and Mayur will take you to the ULTIMATE destination and get you, your food fix. So join us and go completely 'FoodMAD with Rocky & Mayur'.

programme.title: Band Baajaa Bride
programme.desc: Band Baajaa Bride-The Makeover Show, gives Indian Brides a chance to look like a model by selecting a dream outfit, getting the best make up in the industry and working with the best hairstylists, getting her skin treated and losing weight with experts.

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Known for its shipowners, captains, and countless treasures, the Island of Andros has been away from mass tourism for years, which works to its advantage!

programme.title: HOTELS in the Mountains Part 3
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction London in the UK.

programme.title: Our Auto Expert

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The team of anglers cast into the flats off the coast of Belize in pursuit of bonefish. Tom Brokaw & Bill Klyn casts from a boat, McGuane & Yvon Chouninard try their luck wading & Michael Keaton & Lori-Ann Murphy use both methods.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: Old friends Michael Keaton & Tom McGuane share a boat together, which means there will be plenty of action & plenty of laughts. Bonefish & Tarpon Trust's Aaron Adams helps Zach Gilford dance with a tarpon for the first time.

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: Laura and Nick explore the techniques to deal with these apex predators when they are the most dangerous. We'll scientifically breakdown the behaviors, strength, eyesight and speed of mountain lions through outrageous experiments, in day and night.

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path
programme.desc: The brothers traverse the country's interconnecting network of waterways by ferryboat. From shrimp baron, to peasant fishermen, lofty temple ruins to anonymous chai wallahs, they make their way to Kushtia, home to the shrine of Guru Lalone Shaw.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's in Oklahoma City, where a funky food truck turns out wood-fired pizza and Grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe. In Fort Lauderdale, FL, he chills with Vanilla Ice at a pirate-inspired joint serving up Brazilian and Caribbean seafood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
